Name: -1_taste_bad_person_like
Representative_Docs: ["Someone has a bad taste in something when they enjoy something I do not; for example I would say someone might have a 'bad taste' in movies if they watch a lot of rom-coms. Someone else could also say that they have a good taste in movies; it is very subjective.", "When I say that someone has bad taste, I generally mean that I view negatively the art/music/literature that that person enjoys.  That is, I don't think it conveys any meaning, I don't think that the person who created it has any talent, and I don't see the value in it.  I have to admit that it often means that this is very subjective, in that it often means that I myself don't like the art/music/literature at all myself.", 'The person enjoys something that I think is bad. Like they enjoy a certain movies and they recommend those movies to me. The movies are usually horrible. I would say that person has bad taste.']

Name: 0_taste_bad_person_things
Representative_Docs: ['Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste.', "Bad taste to me usually means someone prefers things that seem ugly or just not good to me.  People with bad taste usually don't like things that are considered to be in good taste by most people.", 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste.']

Name: 1_like_things_choices_just
Representative_Docs: ['Mostly it is enjoying and flaunting simple things that appeal to the lowest common denominator.  Also liking things that most simple if not stupid people like is an exemplar of bad taste.  For me too enjoying something that is done solely for money or the appearance of it is bad taste.', 'They like something I don’t like.', 'I mean that someone is a mindless consumer. They watch the shows that everyone else watches, just to fit in. They listen to whatever pablum comes on the radio. They enjoy the lowest common denominator. I have described a band before as "music for people who don\'t like music". People who like those insipid bands have bad tatse']

Name: 2_person_clothing_loud_sense
Representative_Docs: ['To piggyback off my clothing example, an individual with "bad taste" in clothing would be someone that has no understanding or doesn\'t make an attempt at understanding what articles of clothing work with, or compliment, each other.', "Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn't realize that others may take offense. A person who can't distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority.", 'Someone who watches conspiracy theory shows and drama based reality TV about people’s personal lives. Ancient Aliens and similar shows acively try to mislead people. Shows like Honey Boo Boo and similar just encourage drama amongst the people involved.']
